    Index

    A B C D E F H I J L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    AiAuditEvent - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.audit
    Safe audit metadata that excludes prompts, evidence, responses, and credentials.
    AiAuditEvent(Instant, String, String, String, String, String, Duration, AiResponseStatus) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.audit.AiAuditEvent
    Normalizes user-controlled metadata before it reaches logs.
    AiAuditSink - Interface in com.shaft.pilot.audit
    Receives safe local audit metadata.
    AiBudget - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Per-request limits for model usage.
    AiBudget(long, long, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiBudget
    Creates and validates a request budget.
    AiCapabilities - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Provider capabilities that callers can inspect before submitting evidence.
    AiCapabilities(boolean, boolean, boolean, long, ProcessingLocation) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiCapabilities
    Creates an instance of a AiCapabilities record class.
    AiExecutionService - Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Enforces approval, redaction, budgets, concurrency, retries, schema validation, and circuit breaking before accepting provider output.
    AiExecutionService() - Constructor for class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiExecutionService
    Creates a service using current SHAFT properties, service discovery, and safe SHAFT audit logging.
    AiExecutionService(AiProviderRegistry, Supplier, AiAuditSink) - Constructor for class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiExecutionService
    Creates a service with injectable collaborators.
    AiImage - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Immutable image evidence.
    AiImage(EvidenceCategory, String, byte[]) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiImage
    Creates an immutable defensive copy of image data.
    AiProvider - Interface in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    SHAFT-owned contract implemented by optional AI providers.
    AiProviderAvailability - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Safe provider availability result.
    AiProviderAvailability(boolean, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiProviderAvailability
    Creates an instance of a AiProviderAvailability record class.
    AiProviderRegistry - Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Resolves explicit current-thread providers before ServiceLoader providers, then falls back to the disabled provider.
    AiProviderRegistry() - Constructor for class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiProviderRegistry
     
    AiRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Immutable provider-neutral request.
    AiRequest(String, String, String, String, List, List, JsonNode, Duration, AiBudget, ApprovalPolicy, JsonNode) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiRequest
    Creates and defensively copies a request.
    AiRequest.Builder - Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Fluent builder for AiRequest.
    AiResponse - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Provider-neutral AI result with deterministic fallback.
    AiResponse(String, AiResponseStatus, String, String, JsonNode, List, Duration, AiUsage, String, JsonNode) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiResponse
    Creates an immutable response.
    AiResponseStatus - Enum Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Normalized provider and policy outcomes.
    AiUsage - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Provider-reported usage metadata.
    AiUsage(long, long, BigDecimal) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiUsage
    Creates an instance of a AiUsage record class.

    Returns the value of the allowedEvidenceCategories record component.
    allows(ProcessingLocation, Set) - Method in record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.ApprovalPolicy
    Returns whether a provider location and all requested evidence categories are approved.

    Returns the value of the apiKeyEnvironmentVariable record component.

    approvalPolicy(ApprovalPolicy) - Method in class com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiRequest.Builder
    Sets explicit request approval.
    ApprovalPolicy - Record Class in com.shaft.pilot.ai
    Explicit consent for local or remote inference and evidence categories.
    ApprovalPolicy(boolean, boolean, Set) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.pilot.ai.ApprovalPolicy
    Creates an immutable approval policy.

    availability() - Method in interface com.shaft.pilot.ai.AiProvider
    Checks local configuration without transmitting evidence.

    Returns unavailable without performing any network call.
